name: Debbie
subject: GOP attack on women's health
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail
body:
| |
---
| |
---
| Friends, **President Donald Trump just made it more difficult for women to access birth control and other contraceptive methods.** His latest order would allow _any_ employer to deny coverage for contraception for any reason whatsoever. That would mean millions of women would have to pay out-of-pocket to acquire contraceptives. Even if a woman is taking oral contraceptives to treat Polycystic Ovary Syndrome, menstrual disorders, or endometriosis, she will be forced to pay more and pay out-of-pocket. [_**What Trump did was downright shameful. Sign this petition opposing Trump 's latest order on contraceptives.**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113e0f/622b7b5b/677ede9/307bd35c/4104202021/VEsH/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e171006") Before Trump and Republicans interfered, more than 55 million women had their contraceptive coverage guaranteed by their insurance. With Donald Trump's order, not anymore. **It is 2017. Women 's rights ARE human rights.** Women are entitled to affordable, accessible health care and yes, that includes being in charge of their own reproductive care. [_**We need to hold Trump and Republicans accountable. Add your name opposing their latest attack on women 's health.**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113e0f/622b7b5b/677ede9/307bd35c/4104202021/VEsE/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e171006") Thank you, Debbie |
Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
[Click here](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113e0f/622b7b5b/677ede9/307bd35f/4104202021/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://www.debbiewassermanschultz.com/subscriptions/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") to unsubscribe
---

Even if a woman is taking oral contraceptives to treat Polycystic Ovary Syndrome, menstrual disorders, or endometriosis, she will be forced to pay more and pay out-of-pocket. "" Before Trump and Republicans interfered, more than 55 million women had their contraceptive coverage guaranteed by their insurance. With Donald Trump's order, not anymore. It is 2017. Women 's rights ARE human rights. Women are entitled to affordable, accessible health care and yes, that includes being in charge of their own reproductive care. "" Thank you, Debbie | Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com "" to unsubscribe

name: Team Kasich
subject: The latest
body:
Following the horrific attack in Las Vegas, Gov. John Kasich
recorded the following video message about how we can overcome
this tragedy together.

Peter, following the horrific
attack in Las Vegas, Gov. John Kasich recorded the following
video message about how we can overcome this tragedy together:

Gov. Kasich was also recently a
guest on CBS This Morning, where he spoke about coming together
to find common-sense improvements to our nation's gun laws:

We're excited to share with you
that Gov. Kasich will join former Vice President Joe Biden on
October 17th for a bipartisan discussion about how to bridge the
many political divides that exist in our country. The event will
be hosted and moderated by the University of Delaware. Learn more
here.

Gov. Kasich was honored to
receive the Concord Coalition's annual Economic Patriot Award for
his leadership in balancing Ohio's state budgets and his advocacy
of a federal balanced budget:

While in New York last week, Gov.
Kasich endorsed NY State Assemblyman Chad Lupinacci, candidate
for Huntington Town Supervisor. To learn more about his campaign
or consider supporting him, please visit: Chad2017.com

Paid for by Kasich
for America, not authorized by any candidate or candidate's
committee.
www.JohnKasich.com

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system July 18, 2015.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://email.sermodigital.com/p/isYTHZ0EAN

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:
http://email.sermodigital.com/p/osYTHZ0EAN

To unsubscribe from future mailings, send an email to mailto:unsub-47168872992-echo3-7089E14CB1773CA9F4CF575AD26B4D7A@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings
with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

name: Larry Cohen, Our Revolution
subject: Another tax giveaway
body:
#
Friends,
The GOP is at it again. We've always known they will stop at nothing to repeal the Affordable Care Act. Now they are trying to destroy Medicaid and Medicare by giving huge tax breaks to corporations and the very wealthy.
Instead of protecting access to health care for our nation's most vulnerable citizens, Republicans are proposing that corporate tax rates are cut from 35 to 20 percent while slashing services to seniors and the poor. If that wasn't bad enough, this plan could also raise taxes on working and middle-class families. That's right, we could be paying more in taxes and cutting health care for people who cannot afford it.
[**Add your name to our petition if you agree that it is time to make corporations pay their fair share in taxes and protect Medicare and Medicaid.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7af31/bed43eb/1b166bcc/75fff488/1922501135/VEsH/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/stand-up-to-corporate-greed-c?source=em171007-subc")
For forty years, Congress has cut taxes for corporations while income inequality grew and millions of people were slowly cut off from basic health care, education, or nutrition. While they actively sabotaged vital public services in back rooms and took money from corporate lobbyists, GOP leaders told the public that the programs were failing and we had no choice but to privatize them.
[**We have to stand up to corporate greed. Add your name to our petition rejecting tax reform that cuts Medicare and Medicaid to pay for tax breaks for corporations.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7af31/bed43eb/1b166bcc/75fff488/1922501135/VEsE/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/stand-up-to-corporate-greed-c?source=em171007-subc")
Together, we can stand up to corporate greed and a health care system that puts profits over people. We can't do this without you.
In solidarity,
Larry Cohen
Board Chair
Our Revolution
**[ADD YOUR NAME»](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7af31/bed43eb/1b166bcc/75fff488/1922501135/VEsF/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/stand-up-to-corporate-greed-c?source=em171007-subc")**
PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
603 2ND ST, NE
WASHINGTON, DC, 20002

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.
603 2nd St NE, Washington, DC 20002
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7af31/bed43eb/1b166bcc/75fff48b/1922501135/VEsC/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/information-update?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7af31/bed43eb/1b166bcc/75fff48a/1922501135/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIyMTIzIn0=/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7af31/bed43eb/1b166bcc/75fff4b5/1922501135/VEsA/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Help us continue transforming American politics and fighting for progressive candidates and causes by [contributing to Our Revolution here](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7af31/bed43eb/1b166bcc/75fff4b4/1922501135/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR").

name: Kyle Machado, Our Revolution
subject: Fwd: Can you make next Wednesday?
body:
#
Friends,

I wanted to make sure you saw this important email from our friends at Public Citizen about an important action, happening this coming Wednesday. We'll gather with fair trade allies and activists to deliver more than 350,000 petition signatures to congress. We must make our voice loud and clear - **ISDS must not be included in any NAFTA replacement.**
ISDS, put simply, allows multinational corporations a private court room, where they can sue the U.S., Canadian and Mexican governments before a panel of three corporate lawyers, who can award the corporations unlimited sums to be paid by us, the taxpayers. Will you join us to speak out against this corperate overreach?
**[Replace NAFTA Petition Delivery& Press Conference](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7af3e/bed43eb/1bf53f24/75fff716/2710710493/VEsH/ "https://actionnetwork.org/events/replace-nafta-petition-delivery-press-conference")
Wednesday, October 11
10:15am - 11:00am
House Triangle - United States Capitol, Washington DC 20016**
****[rSVP](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7af3e/bed43eb/1bf53f24/75fff711/2710710493/VEsE/ "https://actionnetwork.org/events/replace-nafta-petition-delivery-press-conference?link_id=2&can_id=4e28b416fb43a7fbb3ad0ac0e2185d70&source=email-can-you-make-next-wednesday&email_referrer=email_244651___subject_295085&email_subject=can-you-make-next-wednesday")****

Thanks, and we look forward to you joining us this Wednesday.

Solidarity,

Kyle Machado
Director of Organizing
Our Revolution

\----------Forwarded message----------
From: Rose Espinola, Public Citizen's Global Trade Watch
Subject: Can you make next Wednesday?
When Members of Congress walked down the hall to their offices this week, they received a clear message. Activists have filled the halls of Congress with #EndISDS door hangers because the ugly reality of the Investor-State-Dispute Settlement (ISDS) system can no longer be ignored.
For months, you, me, and other trade justice activists have been urging Members of Congress to publicly oppose any NAFTA replacement that includes ISDS. Many of our Members of Congress have begun questioning the corporate power grab - but others have stayed mum. Can you join us on Wednesday at 10:15am for a petition delivery?
We will join Congressional and union leaders as over 350,000 petitions are delivered to Congress demanding that ISDS be eliminated from NAFTA. That same day, Trump administration officials are expected to present a proposal on the controversial issue, during the 4th round of renegotiations, taking place right here in DC. Civil society organizations and unions throughout North America are united in demanding ISDS be eliminated from NAFTA.
**[Replace NAFTA Petition Delivery& Press Conference](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7af3e/bed43eb/1bf53f24/75fff716/2710710493/VEsF/ "https://actionnetwork.org/events/replace-nafta-petition-delivery-press-conference")
Wednesday, October 11
10:15am - 11:00am
House Triangle - United States Capitol, Washington DC 20016**
Please RSVP here, or send me an email to let me know you'll be able to make it.
Warm Regards,
Rose Espinola
National Field Director
Public Citizen's Global Trade Watch
PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
603 2ND ST, NE
WASHINGTON, DC, 20002

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.
603 2nd St NE, Washington, DC 20002
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7af3e/bed43eb/1bf53f24/75fff710/2710710493/VEsC/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/information-update?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7af3e/bed43eb/1bf53f24/75fff713/2710710493/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIyMTIzIn0=/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7af3e/bed43eb/1bf53f24/75fff712/2710710493/VEsA/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Help us continue transforming American politics and fighting for progressive candidates and causes by [contributing to Our Revolution here](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7af3e/bed43eb/1bf53f24/75fff71d/2710710493/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR").

name: LAST CHANCE (via DSCC)
subject: LAST CALL: Your "Nevertheless, She Persisted" tote bag
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
We're closing online orders on our "Nevertheless, She Persisted" tote bag in 72 hours.
---
**[](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wsn-tote?refcode=DPE-20171008-LastChanceDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**
Team,

**We 're closing online orders on our "Nevertheless, She Persisted" tote bag in 72 hours.**

Our limited-edition tote bag not only shows the world what you stand for, but it helps the Women's Senate Network re-elect a HISTORIC number of women to the Senate.

**[So before we close the books on this order, claim your Women's Senate Network tote bag with a gift of $35 or more today! Get yours now (FREE shipping!) >>](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wsn-tote?refcode=DPE-20171008-LastChanceDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**

[](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wsn-tote?refcode=DPE-20171008-LastChanceDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
Last week was an important reminder of why we need more women in the Senate.

When the Trump administration announced that they were going to roll back birth control access it was Senators like Kirsten Gillibrand who immediately spoke out and said "This shouldn't have been up for debate in the first place. We'll fight back."

But Kirsten is one of the TEN Democratic female Senators up for re-election this cycle. And we're already seeing vicious attack ads being aired against the likes of Claire McCaskill, Tammy Baldwin, and Elizabeth Warren. At a time when we need more women in the Senate standing up to Trump, we can't afford to take a single race for granted. We've got to help our female Senators fight back.

[**So team, can we count on you to help AND score your very own "Nevertheless, She Persisted" tote bag today? Order yours (before time runs out!) >>**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wsn-tote?refcode=DPE-20171008-LastChanceDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Thank you for standing with us,

Team DSCC

P.S. Already ordered a tote bag? Don't worry! We are processing your order. [**You can click here to order a second tote bag now.**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wsn-tote?refcode=DPE-20171008-LastChanceDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954dedb/2b07114c/ef53a91d/73151ecb/976102470/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954dedb/2b07114c/ef53a91d/73151eca/976102470/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954dedb/2b07114c/ef53a91d/73151ec5/976102470/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.
---
